title: Airtable Workspace
description: An Airtable workspace is an organizational container that groups related bases together. Workspaces provide a shared collaboration boundary with configurable permissions for team members.

id.description: The unique identifier for the workspace (starts with 'wsp').

name.description: The display name of the workspace.

collaborators.description: The individual user collaborators on this workspace.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the collaborator.

email.description: The email address of the collaborator.

permissionLevel.description: The permission level of the collaborator.

groupCollaborators.description: The user group collaborators on this workspace.

groupId.description: The unique identifier of the user group.

name.description: The name of the user group.

permissionLevel.description: The permission level of the group.
